episodes.title: EXCLUSIVE | Wife of Memphis nonprofit founder arrested on Epstein Island speaks out
episodes.description: Jessica Owen, the wife of the Memphis native who was 'hogtied' on Epstein Island, speaks with ABC24.

episodes.title: Memphis man charged with trespassing on Epstein Island; his wife talked to ABC24
episodes.description: The wife of the Memphis nonprofit owner charged with trespassing on Epstein Island spoke with ABC24's Lauren Turman.
